title: maltea vacillans
intro: Maltea vacillans, also known as the "shaking or trembling plant," is a flowering plant species that belongs to the balsam family and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Maltea vacillans include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water, or it can be used to make a tincture by extracting its active compounds with a solvent such as ethanol or glycerin.
